title: Tweaks from the Bourg
description: Overhauls the look of Minecraft, a mix of old and new.
body:
**Tweaks from the Bourg** is a resource pack that aims to overhaul the look of Minecraft, bringing back a more rough feel back to the game whilst keeping things clean and simple. In essence the pack merges Programmer art and the Modern look of Minecraft.

![A demonstration image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acc898f6597fed6e4141be91dff1116c583a106c.jpeg)   Currently the Resource pack is not finished, but it is certainly playable as most blocks you will run into on your vanilla playthrough have been retextured.                                      <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/BpasdR1Ira4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
